name: Bill Kristol
summary: Conservative commentator and Weekly Standard co-founder who publicly called Trump unfit in 2016 and later urged support for Joe Biden in 2020.

keyStatements.quote: [Trump is] unfit to be president of the United States.
keyStatements.source: CNN (The Lead with Jake Tapper transcript)
keyStatements.context: Panel discussion on Trump's comments about the Khan family

keyStatements.quote: He is unstable. I really think so.
keyStatements.source: CNN (The Lead with Jake Tapper transcript)
keyStatements.context: Same segment; assessment of Trump's temperament

keyStatements.quote: We need a president who has a good plan to deal with COVID.
keyStatements.context: "2 Bills 4 Biden" video supporting Joe Biden

timeline.significance: Launched a conservative magazine that ran for 23 years

timeline.event: Called Trump unfit and unstable on CNN
The Weekly Standard announced it would close

timeline.significance: Encouraged voters to support Joe Biden

credibility.background: Influential conservative intellectual, founded The Weekly Standard, former chief of staff to VP Dan Quayle
positions: Founder and Editor, The Weekly Standard (1995-2018)
Chief of Staff to Vice President Dan Quayle (1989-1993)

oppositionReasons: Called Trump unfit for the presidency
Argued for Biden as the better choice to handle COVID

sources.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper (CNN) transcript, Aug. 3, 2016
VIDEO: Billy Crystal and Bill Kristol Encourage Jews to Vote for Biden
The Weekly Standard is closing after 23 years
